contractor_pricing_source: Preliminary estimates from 2 local BCS contractors with coastal residential experience (collected during bidding phase preparation)
notes: Contractor pricing (MXN 8,200,000) is 17% below the preliminary cost estimate (MXN 9,907,480). This is within normal variance for coastal residential in BCS — the preliminary estimate used a conservative MXN 22,000/sqm coastal benchmark; actual bids reflect efficient local contractors with established coastal site protocols. No value engineering required. Pool and solar are quoted as separate line items by specialist subcontractors; these are within the client's stated budget range. Recommend proceeding to executive plans.
